case_title: BORONER, PAZ L. MRS. ET AL VS COLOMBO, GIOVANNI MR. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,849.94 FILED BY BORONER, PAZ L. MRS. ET AL AS TO DEFENDANT COLOMBO, GIOVANNI MR. COLOMBO, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORONER, PAZ L. MRS. ET AL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLOMBO, GIOVANNI MR. COLOMBO, MARIA $1,505.13 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,520.13, DAMAGES ALLOWED STOVE, HOOD & INSTALLATION $482.04 KITCHEN LINOLEUM $315, DINING RM CARPET $315, STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT COLOMBO, GIOVANNI MR. COLOMBO, MARIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BORONER, PAZ L. MRS. ET AL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT COLOMBO, GIOVANNI MR. COLOMBO, MARIA
